ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the passenger survived the disaster */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Travel class of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "class" TEXT /* Travel class (First, Second, Third) */,
  "who" TEXT /* Person type (man, woman, child) */,
  "adult_male" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger is an adult male */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck number (where applicable) */,
  "embark_town" TEXT /* Town of embarkation */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique ticket number */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "lifeboat" TEXT /* Lifeboat used (if any) */,
  "rescue_ship" TEXT /* Rescue ship (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "related_passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related passenger */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, spouse, parent, child) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_relationships_related_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_relationships_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel class (First, Second, Third) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers in the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "town" TEXT /* Town where the port is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Amount of fare paid */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fare was paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the fare was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Name of the deck */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deck */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers on the deck */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available on the deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Indicates whether the passenger survived the disaster
Whether the passenger is an adult male
Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, spouse, parent, child)
Unique identifier for each travel class
Name of the travel class (First, Second, Third)
Maximum number of passengers in the class
Town where the port is located
Country where the port is located
Currency in which the fare was paid
Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card)
Date when the fare was paid
Maximum number of passengers on the deck
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator)
Unique identifier for each access event
Date when the database was accessed
IP address from which the access occurred
User agent string of the device used
